baseline.comment: Set 'relative: true' to compute F0 over a fraction of initial samples as specified by 'parameter' value (from 0 to 1). On the contrary, if 'relative: false', 'parameter' indicates the actual number of samples to be used to compute the baseline value F0.

collapse.comment: 'median_width' (odd number recommended) is the width of the median pre-filter, 'step_win' is the (un-normalized) convolution window to be used for event detection, 'protect' indicates the number of initial time samples to exclude from the drop-off detection, 'noise_factor' is the multiplicative factor applied to the noise of the processed (convoluted) signal to get the final (negative) threshold.
